HEADLINE: Frequently Asked Questions

---

Q1: How does Lumina connect to my calendar?

A: Download the Lumina app and grant access to your Google Calendar, Outlook, or Apple Calendar. Lumina reads your events and adjusts automatically. Your calendar data stays private—we never store it on our servers. Learn more in our privacy policy.

---

Q2: What if I don't want it to sync with my calendar?

A: Calendar sync is completely optional. You can use Lumina in "Circadian Mode" where it adjusts based purely on time of day and ambient room light. Or manually control it anytime. You're always in charge.

---

Q3: Does Lumina work with my existing smart home setup?

A: Yes! Lumina integrates with all major smart home platforms including Google Home, Amazon Alexa, and Apple HomeKit. Control it with voice commands, routines, or the dedicated Lumina app.

---

Q4: What's the warranty and return policy?

A: Lumina comes with a 30-day money-back guarantee and a 2-year manufacturer's warranty. If you're not completely satisfied, return it within 30 days for a full refund. No questions asked. We're that confident you'll love it.

---

Q5: How long will Lumina last? What's the bulb lifespan?

A: Lumina uses premium LED technology rated for 50,000+ hours of operation. That's roughly 10 years of 24/7 use, or 25+ years of typical use (8 hours daily). The LEDs are not replaceable—when Lumina eventually needs a refresh (decades from now), you'll likely want the newer model anyway.

---

Q6: Is it expensive to run? What's the power consumption?

A: Lumina uses approximately 15-20 watts when at full brightness (standard desk lighting), consuming roughly $2-3 per year in electricity. It's actually more efficient than traditional incandescent bulbs and comparable to LED desk lamps.

---

Q7: Can I adjust the color temperature and brightness manually?

A: Absolutely. Use the intuitive touch controls on the lamp itself, the mobile app, or voice commands. Lumina's automation is powerful, but you're never forced into it. Manual control is always available with one touch.

---

Q8: What if I travel or have an irregular work schedule?

A: Lumina adapts to irregular schedules. You can pause calendar sync, manually adjust settings, or create custom routines. If you're traveling across time zones, simply open the app and set your local time. Lumina recalibrates within hours.

---

Q9: Does Lumina work with standing desks that move up and down?

A: Yes. Lumina has a sturdy weighted base with a non-skid bottom. It stays stable on moving desks. If you have a very small desk space, our optional mounting bracket allows you to clamp Lumina to your desk or shelves.

---

Q10: I have blue light sensitivity. Is Lumina safe for me?

A: Lumina's evening mode uses warm, low-blue light specifically designed to be gentle on sensitive eyes and to promote natural melatonin production. That said, everyone's biology is different. We recommend starting with our Night Mode in the evening and adjusting from there. Our 30-day guarantee means you can try risk-free.

A: Lumina uses approximately 15-20 watts when at full brightness (standard desk lighting), consuming roughly $2-3 per year in electricity. It's actually more efficient than traditional incandescent bulbs and comparable to LED desk lamps.

---

Q7: Can I adjust the color temperature and brightness manually?

A: Absolutely. Use the intuitive touch controls on the lamp itself, the mobile app, or voice commands. Lumina's automation is powerful, but you're never forced into it. Manual control is always available with one touch.

---

Q8: What if I travel or have an irregular work schedule?

A: Lumina adapts to irregular schedules. You can pause calendar sync, manually adjust settings, or create custom routines. If you're traveling across time zones, simply open the app and set your local time. Lumina recalibrates within hours.

---

Q9: Does Lumina work with standing desks that move up and down?

A: Yes. Lumina has a sturdy weighted base with a non-skid bottom. It stays stable on moving desks. If you have a very small desk space, our optional mounting bracket allows you to clamp Lumina to your desk or shelves.

---

Q10: I have blue light sensitivity. Is Lumina safe for me?

A: Lumina's evening mode uses warm, low-blue light specifically designed to be gentle on sensitive eyes and to promote natural melatonin production. That said, everyone's biology is different. We recommend starting with our Night Mode in the evening and adjusting from there. Our 30-day guarantee means you can try risk-free.
